name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning update from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Good morning {{firstName}},

Here's a gentle check-in on how things looked at {{orgName}} yesterday. A few new faces reached out, some appointments moved through the calendar, and the day closed out without anything urgent waiting for you.

No action needed on our end — just wanted you to have the picture before patients start arriving. We'll keep things running smoothly on this side.

Warmly,
— Bright Smile Dental
